chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-3893 / 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ PRIORITY. 1) For orders on office objections. 2) For hearing of CMA No. 17893/2023. 3) For hearing of main case. 28.08.2023. M/s. Ghulam Haider Shaikh & Shahan Ali Jawehary, Advocates for Petitioner. Mr. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Respondent. Mr. Tariq Aziz, Principal Appraiser. ________________ This Petition was filed being aggrieved with Valuation Ruling No. 1797/2023 dated 04.08.2023 as according to the learned Counsel for the Petitioner Review under Section 25D of the Customs Act, 1969 was pending before the Director General (Valuation), Karachi and in the meantime, certain goods were imported, and were being assessed on the said Valuation Ruling of which the revision was pending. Through ad- interim order, Respondents were directed to release the goods of the Petitioner by securing the disputed amount of duty and taxes which stands complied with. Therefore, apparently, this Petition has served its purpose. In view of the above, this Petition is disposed of by directing that Review Application of Petitioner, if any, filed or pending before the Director General (Valuation) shall be decided and dealt with in accordance with law. Till such time, final order(s) are passed as above, the security as furnished shall not be encashed. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
